A11y App: Fix high contrast mode — highlight card borders & non-text UI elements (not just text)
description: High contrast currently only boosts text. Borders, icons, and dividers also need visible contrast.

task: A11y App: Add color scheme options — dark mode, light mode, custom user color picker
description: Let users pick their own color theme — not just dark/light but full custom palette.

task: A11y App: Research AI-driven UI customization
A11y App: Implement AI-driven UI customization (simple language, layout switching, chart captions, text simplification)
description: Use AI to simplify complex text, describe charts, and adapt layout for cognitive accessibility.

task: Dashboard: Add mobile breakpoints to all detail pages
description: Detail pages break on phone screens. Add responsive CSS so everything stacks and scales properly.

task: Dashboard: Fix contrast ratio — lighten --text-3 to WCAG AA (4.5:1)
description: Secondary text is too dim. Bump it up so it passes WCAG AA contrast requirements.

task: Dashboard: Fix --fs-xs from 13px to 14px + a11y widget font sizes
description: Smallest text is below the 14px minimum. Increase base sizes across the board.

task: Dashboard: Add <main> landmarks, aria-hidden on icons, focus-visible styles
description: Screen readers need landmarks to navigate. Decorative icons should be hidden. Focus needs to be visible.

task: Dashboard: Security hardening — CSP, pin Lucide + SRI, Object.create(null)
description: Add Content Security Policy headers, pin external script versions, prevent prototype pollution.

task: Dashboard: A11y widget — 44px touch target on close btn, remove red from reset
description: Close button is too small for touch. Red on Reset conflicts with Elli's no-red preference.

task: Finish onboarding this week
A11y Tester Toolkit: Add tab order visualization, color contrast checker, focus indicator testing, ARIA validation, form label audit
description: Suite of testing tools embedded in the dashboard for live accessibility auditing.

task: Dashboard: Fix Reset All button in a11y panel — verify it clears all settings and re-renders correctly
description: Reset button may not clear all new features (reading guide, big cursor). Verify and fix.

task: Dashboard: A11y panel advanced settings — custom font picker (multiple fonts), custom color pickers for text, background, links/buttons
description: Let users choose from multiple fonts and pick exact colors for text, backgrounds, and interactive elements.

task: Build A11y Expert MCP — MVP — 4 tools working locally
description: Core tools: review_code, get_pattern, list_patterns, check_contrast.

task: Build A11y Expert MCP — Add Resources & Prompts
description: Expose knowledge base docs as MCP resources and add guided prompts for common a11y tasks.

task: Build A11y Expert MCP — Push to GitHub
description: Open-source the project so others can use and contribute.

task: Build A11y Expert MCP — Publish to PyPI
